roleArn.description: ARN for the AWS IAM Role the Golioth PKI Service should assume.

blueprintId.title: Blueprint ID assigned to the device

certificateId.title: Certificate ID assigned to the device, if the device uses certificate-based authentication

cohortId.title: Cohort ID of the cohort the device belongs to

hardwareIds.title: List of hardware IDs associated with the device

tagIds.title: List of tag IDs attached to the device

updatedAt.title: Timestamp of the last update to the device

goliothDeviceLogEntry.description: Event generated when a device sends logs.

lastSeenOnline.title: Timestamp of when the device was last seen online

addHardwareId.title: Hardware IDs to append for this device

addTagId.title: Tag IDs to append for this device

blueprintId.title: Optional Blueprint ID to assign to the device

cohortId.description:
Optional Cohort ID to assign the device to.
Setting to an empty string removes the device from its cohort without assigning it to a new one.

enabled.title: Optionally enable or disable the device

hardwareIds.title: Full list of hardware IDs to set for this device, replacing any existing ones

name.title: Optional new name for the device

removeHardwareId.title: Hardware IDs to remove from this device

removeTagId.title: Tag IDs to remove from this device

tagIds.title: Full list of tag IDs to set for this device, replacing any existing ones

blueprintId.title: Optional Blueprint ID to assign to the device

cohortId.title: Optional Cohort ID to assign the device to

hardwareIds.title: Optional list of hardware IDs to add to the device. A single hardware ID will be generated if none are specified

name.title: Name of the device. Must be unique within the project

tagIds.title: Optional list of tag IDs to attach to the device

total.title: Total number of devices matching the request

nextPageToken.title: Token to get the next page

prevPageToken.title: Token to get the previous page

code.title:
Error code.
Possible values:
- 0: Sync successful
- 1: Key not recognized
- 2: Key not valid
- 3: Value format not valid
- 4: Value outside of allowed range
- 5: Value string too long
- 6: General error

deviceDetails.title: Optional detailed information about the error provided by the device

key.title: Key of the setting that has the error

errors.title: List of setting errors reported by the device

reportedVersion.title: Version of the settings reported by the device, if any

status.title:
Overall status of the settings, if known.
Possible values:
- "no-settings": There are no settings for this device
- "in-sync": The device settings are in sync with the server
- "out-of-sync": The device settings are out of sync with the server

syncTime.title: Timestamp of the last settings sync

protobufNullValue.description:
`NullValue` is a singleton enumeration to represent the null value for the
`Value` type union.

The JSON representation for `NullValue` is JSON `null`.

 - NULL_VALUE: Null value.

parameters.description: leave out end to get all events up to now
parameters.name: endTime

parameters.description: leave out end to get all events up to now
parameters.name: endTime

parameters.description: TODO: filter by: device_id, enabled/disabled, start/end expiration date, cert type, may increase filters in the future
parameters.name: perPage

get.description:
List devices in the project, optionally applying filters and pagination parameters.

Devices can be filtered by any property, and additionally filtered by a freetext search term.

parameters.description:
Pagination items per page.
Must be between 1 and 100 (inclusive). Default is 100.
parameters.name: perPage

parameters.description: Filter by tag IDs. Devices must have all specified tags.
parameters.name: tags

parameters.description: Path to device state to include in the response
parameters.name: statePath

parameters.description: Path to device stream data to include in the response
parameters.name: streamPath

parameters.description: Partial text search term to filter devices by name or hardware IDs
parameters.name: term

post.description:
Create a new device with a unique name in an existing project. The tags, blueprint and cohort must already have been created.

If no hardware ID is specified, a new hardware ID is generated. The device will also be assigned a unique device ID that can be used to fetch it later.

delete.description: Permanently delete a device and all its data. Data already pushed to other services by this device will not be removed retroactively.

get.description: Get a device by its assigned device ID.
get.summary: Get a device by its ID

patch.description:
Use the `PUT` method to replace a device in its entirety, or the `PATCH` method to replace a subset of the device properties.

For the `PATCH` method, hardware IDs and tags can be added or removed with the `add_...` and `remove_...` properties respectively, or the entire set of hardware IDs or tags can be replaced by assigning a value to their respective properties.

requestBody.description: Update to apply to the device

put.description:
Use the `PUT` method to replace a device in its entirety, or the `PATCH` method to replace a subset of the device properties.

For the `PATCH` method, hardware IDs and tags can be added or removed with the `add_...` and `remove_...` properties respectively, or the entire set of hardware IDs or tags can be replaced by assigning a value to their respective properties.

parameters.description: Field mask specifying which fields to update (only used for PATCH requests)
parameters.name: updateMask

requestBody.description: Update to apply to the device
